description.from: Given a database under concurrent write load, when N threads call put() simultaneously, every record should be persisted with no lost writes, corrupted files, or duplicate PKs. Spec: features/concurrency/concurrent_writes.feature
description.to: Given a database under concurrent write load, when N threads call put() simultaneously, every record should be persisted with no lost writes, corrupted files, or duplicate PKs. Concurrent puts to the same PK use last-write-wins: no error, final state is one of the written values. Spec: features/concurrency/concurrent_writes.feature
